title: TallerApp
description: Full-stack web application for end-to-end auto repair shop management — clients, vehicles, repair orders, inventory, appointments and PDF invoicing. Final degree project (TFG).

title: Gym Tracker
description: Offline-first PWA for workout tracking: weekly routines, automatic PR detection, SVG rest timer and custom progress chart. FastAPI backend with shared SSO. Real personal use, in production.
thumbAlt: Gym Tracker screenshots — Today, History, Progress, Routines and Profile tabs of the PWA

title: JASB Website
description: Corporate website for JASB Energy & Telco with custom i18n, Schema.org and SEO optimization. Accessible, multi-language and free of heavy dependencies.
thumbAlt: jasbct.com hero — JASB Energy & Telco · connecting the cities of the future

title: Trading Bot · Multi-agent AI
descriptionHtml: Multi-market automated trading system on Polymarket: 24 crypto markets (BTC, ETH, SOL…) with Selective Latency Arbitrage + Kelly Criterion. 3 LLM agents (Risk Manager, Market Context, Sentinel) supervise via Ollama, real-time data through Binance WebSocket. Live on VPS.
thumbAlt: Bot dashboard — global KPIs, P&L chart and grid of 24 markets with individual stats
